extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won Stage 16 after Team Sunweb pre-announced their plan, worked the opening climb to drop KITTEL Marcel, then profited when Sky split the race in crosswinds at 20km to go.
tactical_patterns: MATTHEWS Michael worked on opening climb himself to create KD split, unusual energy expenditure for sprinter paid off later.
Team Sky executed crosswind split at kilometer 18 from right at 30+mph, forcing GC positioning advantage despite obvious timing.
BOUHANNI Nacer bridged 2-minute gap solo then still got dropped in finale, indicating crosswind technical skill matters more than raw power.
Quick-Step spread thin protecting KITTEL Marcel's green jersey, leaving MARTIN Dan exposed without full team support in finale crosswinds.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Willing to burn matches early (pulling first climb, intermediate sprint) for stage setup, exceptional range for sprinter.
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: Lost 12 minutes, team prioritization of green jersey left GC riders like Martin exposed tactically.
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: Lost 50 seconds despite knowing kilometer 18 crosswind split point, positioning failure not legs.
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: Heads-up following Sky rotation in crosswinds, showed tactical awareness under pressure.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Moved into fifth overall via crosswind positioning, Sky protecting dual GC options effectively.
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Caught behind Sky-initiated crosswind split, team unable to anticipate obvious moment.
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: neutral: Saved energy at intermediate sprint for stage finale but eliminated by crosswind split anyway.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: Present at intermediate sprint but unable to contest finale after crosswind selection.
rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: negative: Heroic 30km solo bridge wasted by poor crosswind technique, raw power insufficient.
